plan.failureSummary: The test failed because it could not find the 'Select your occupation' combobox using a cached selector (#\:rl\:-form-item). This ID appears to be dynamically generated, leading to stale cache failures.
observedIndicators: Dynamic ID pattern detected in selectors (e.g., #\:rl\:-form-item)
Quick failure pattern: 25s failure vs 80s+ success duration
Historical alternating success/failure pattern suggests environment or cache instability

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test. This will force the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and identify the correct elements regardless of dynamic ID changes.

remediationSteps.summary: Review use of deterministic mode for pages with dynamic IDs
remediationSteps.details: If the site consistently uses dynamic IDs, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test or using more robust custom selectors if feasible.

plan.notes: The failure pattern (alternating success/fail, fast failure vs slow success) and the use of dynamic IDs (:rj:, :rk:, :rl:) in the cached selectors strongly indicate a stale cache issue. Since the objective is semantically flexible, a fresh AI run will likely resolve the issue.
